text:
Hehe.
On spotting destroyer:
Bridge officer: Captain, we have spotted a German merchant ship, should we engage?
Captain: Not yet, George, keep tracking.
Bridge officer: But... it is unarmed, surely no match for a Royal Navy destroyer?!?
Captain: Keep watching George!
Bridge officer: Oh come on sir, we have been on that patrol duty for weeks, without sinking anything, i can't just return home and tell that girl i met last time in Devon that i just sailed around! She will ditch me for some RAF showoff!
Captain: George! The binoculars!
Bridge officer: Fine! Fine! [Picks up binoculars] Oh look, what a surprise a merry little boat flying a GERMAN FLAG is within our range and we do nothing about it, should have signed up for the damned RAF instead of thi...
[Spotting reaches 100% revealing german battleship and 2 heavy cruisers]
... BLIMEY!!!
Captain: There you go!
Bridge officer: We... should probably call the battleships, huh?
Captain:Yep!

text: Right before the last episode of "School Days" (a Japanese anime which contains a protagonist everyone hates) aired in Japan, there was a 16-year-old girl murdered her father in Kyoto. Because in that episode the protagonist is killed by a girl using a similar method (just don't make me spoil too much plot), the airing was cancelled and replaced with the scene of this damn boat. 4chan users watching this replied "Nice Boat", and that is the born of this meme. "Nice Boat" could refer to many things: censorship, protagonist dies, any person people hate dies, situation in chaos, hoi4 naval combat (WRONG) or... just a simple nice boat.
author: @inno_aiolos

text: Know Your Meme reports that this happened because the day before the episode aired, a Kyoto girl killed her dad with an ax. To avoid association with the crime due to a similar scene in the anime, this was broadcast instead. So basically, the same reason as why America has never seen Tentacruel do 9/11 outside of the title sequence.
author: @AndrewBlechinger

text:
from "Too Soon" on TVTropes:
"One episode of Higurashi: When They Cry and the final episode of School Days had to be delayed for a week in Japan because the contents of it were eerily similar to a murder case in Tokyo, where one girl killed her father with a cleaver which was identical to the kind that Rena has. This eventually led to Higurashi Kai and School Days being dropped from several channels' prime time line up and Higurashi's opening song being reworked to change the scene of Rena's cleaver to that of the junkyard where she goes to. In terms of School Days' changes"
